messages.content: A warehouse has 3 loading docks. Dock A processes 42 pallets per hour, Dock B processes 35, and Dock C processes 28. At 9:00 AM a shipment of 1,890 pallets arrives. Dock C breaks down at 11:00 AM and stays down. At what time is the shipment fully processed? Show your reasoning step by step, then give the final answer as a clock time. /no_think
